messages.content: based upon the PDF file https://www.purebasic.com/documentation/PureBasic.pdf, write a procedure to comment out unused procedures from a source code file with 4 spaces as the default code indentation

```purebasic
Procedure CommentOutUnusedProcedures(sourceFile.s)
    source = ReadFile(sourceFile)

    Procedure findLine(procedureName.s)
        Procedure p.s
        p = "Procedure " + procedureName + "("
        pos = FindString(source, p)
        If pos
            endPos = pos
            Repeat
                endPos = FindString(source, "EndProcedure", endPos)
                If endPos
                    If CountString(StringID(source, pos, endPos), "Procedure ") = 1
                        Exit
                    EndIf
                    endPos = endPos + 11
                EndIf
            Until Not endPos
            endProcedurePos = endPos
            comment = ""
            If FindString(source, "//" + procedureName, pos, endProcedurePos)
                comment = "//"
            EndIf
            newSource = CopyString(source, 1, pos - 1) + comment + "    " + CopyString(source, pos, endProcedurePos)
            source = newSource
        EndIf
    EndProcedure

    Procedure updateSource()
        pos = 1
        While FindString(source, "Procedure ", pos)
            startPos = FindString(source, "Procedure ", pos)
            ProcedureName = Mid(source, startPos + 10, FindString(source, "(", startPos + 10) - startPos - 10)
            findLine(ProcedureName)
            pos = startPos + 1
        Wend
    EndProcedure

    updateSource()
    WriteFile(sourceFile, source)

EndProcedure
```

based upon the PDF file https://www.purebasic.com/documentation/PureBasic.pdf, write a procedure to create an array containing all combinations of 5 numbers with values ranging from 1 to 15 separated by commas per array entry minus combinations that contain 4 or more duplicates of any previous combination in the array with 4 spaces as the default code indentation

```purebasic
Procedure GenerateCombinations()
    Array myArray()    

    Procedure CreateCombination(comb.s)
        If Len(comb) = 25
            AddElement(myArray, comb)
        Else
            For n = 1 To 15
                CreateCombination(comb + n + ",")
            Next
        EndIf
    EndProcedure

    CreateCombination("")

    Procedure CheckDuplicateCombination(arrayIndex.i, currentComb.s)
        If arrayIndex > 0
            currentDupCount = 0
            For i = 1 To 20
                For j = 1 To 4
                    If Mid(myArray(arrayIndex), i, 2) = Mid(currentComb, j * 2 - 1, 2)
                        currentDupCount + 1
                    EndIf
                Next
            Next
            If currentDupCount >= 4
                Procedure removeElement(i.i)
                    SwapElement(myArray(), i, ArraySize(myArray()) - 1)
                    RemoveElement(myArray())
                EndProcedure
                removeElement(arrayIndex)
            EndIf
        EndIf
    EndProcedure

    Procedure RemoveDuplicates()
        For index = 0 To ArraySize(myArray()) - 1
            CheckDuplicateCombination(index, myArray(index))
        Next
    EndProcedure

    RemoveDuplicates()

EndProcedure
```

based upon the PDF file https://www.purebasic.com/documentation/PureBasic.pdf, write a procedure to create an array containing all combinations of numbers from 1 to 15 minus combinations that contain 4 or more duplicates of any previous combination in the array with 4 spaces as the default code indentation

```purebasic
Procedure GenerateCombinations()
    Array myArray()    

    Procedure CreateCombination(comb.s)
        If Len(comb) = 60
            AddElement(myArray, comb)
        Else
            For n = 1 To 15
                CreateCombination(comb + Str(n) + ",")
            Next
        EndIf
    EndProcedure

    CreateCombination("")

    Procedure CheckDuplicateCombination(arrayIndex.i, currentComb.s)
        If arrayIndex > 0
            currentDupCount = 0
            For i = 1 To 45 Step 3
                If Mid(myArray(arrayIndex), i, 2) = Mid(currentComb, i, 2)
                    currentDupCount + 1
                EndIf
            Next
            If currentDupCount >= 4
                Procedure removeElement(i.i)
                    SwapElement(myArray(), i, ArraySize(myArray()) - 1)
                    RemoveElement(myArray())
                EndProcedure
                removeElement(arrayIndex)
            EndIf
        EndIf
    EndProcedure

    Procedure RemoveDuplicates()
        For index = 0 To ArraySize(myArray()) - 1
            CheckDuplicateCombination(index, myArray(index))
        Next
    EndProcedure

    RemoveDuplicates()

EndProcedure
```

based upon the PDF file https://www.purebasic.com/documentation/PureBasic.pdf, write a procedure to display an animated GIF using the built-in CreateImage() and OpenImage() functions with 4 spaces as the default code indentation

```purebasic
Procedure DisplayAnimatedGIF(filePath.s)
    imageID.i = CreateImage(800, 600)
    gifID.i = OpenImage(filePath)
  
    If gifID
        ImageGadget(#PB_Any, 00, 00, 800, 600, imageID, gifID)
  
        While IsWindow(0)
            ImageGadget(#PB_Any, 0, 0, 800, 600, imageID, gifID)
            FlipBuffers()
        Wend
    EndIf
EndProcedure
```

based upon the PDF file https://www.purebasic.com/documentation/PureBasic.pdf, write a procedure to load a multi-dimensional array of text values that may have 3 or 4 dimensions.  Also include example code to call the procedure.  please use 4 spaces as the default indentation for the code produced.

```purebasic
Define LoadTextArray(data.s[,,,*])

Procedure LoadTextArrayFromFile(filePath.s)
    Define Dim1, Dim2, Dim3, Dim4

    Dim fileID.i
    Dim fileContent.s

    fileID = OpenFile(filePath)
    If fileID
        ; Read file content
        fileContent = ReadString(fileID, FileSize(fileID))
        CloseFile(fileID)

        ; Parse the text content to fill the multi-dimensional array
        lines.s() = SplitString(fileContent, #LF)
        Dim1 = ArraySize(lines)
        For i = 0 To Dim1 - 1
            elements.s() = SplitString(lines(i), ",")
            Dim2 = ArraySize(elements)
            For j = 0 To Dim2 - 1
                values.s() = SplitString(elements(j), ";")
                Dim3 = ArraySize(values)
                For k = 0 To Dim3 - 1
                    values4.s() = SplitString(values(k), ":")
                    Dim4 = ArraySize(values4)
                    If Dim4 = 1
                        data(i, j, k) = values(k)
                    ElseIf Dim4 = 2
                        data(i, j, k) = values4(0)
                    EndIf
                Next
            Next
        Next
    EndIf
EndProcedure

; Example code to load a 3-dimensional text array
LoadTextArrayFromFile("data.txt")
```
In this code snippet, the `LoadTextArrayFromFile` procedure is defined to read data from a file and populate a multi-dimensional array `data` with text values. The array can have 3 or 4 dimensions based on the data structure in the file. The example code at the end showcases how to call this procedure to load a 3-dimensional text array.
based upon the PDF file https://www.purebasic.com/documentation/PureBasic.pdf, write a procedure to play any type of WAV audio file with 4 spaces as the default code indentation

```purebasic
; Define the constants to handle audio
Define #PB_Any        0 ; Any play method
Define #PB_Play       1 ; Play method
Define #PB_Loop       2 ; Loop method
Define #PB_Resume     3 ; Resume method
Define #PB_Stop       4 ; Stop method
Define #PB_Pause      5 ; Pause method
Define #PB_Continue   6 ; Continue playing

Procedure PlayWAVAudio(filePath.s)
    audioID.i = PlaySound(0, filePath, #PB_Play | #PB_Loop)
  
    Repeat
        Delay(100)
    Until GetLastSoundStatus() = #PB_Status_Stopped
  
    CloseSound(audioID)
EndProcedure
```

based upon the PDF file https://www.purebasic.com/documentation/PureBasic.pdf, write a procedure to remove entries from a string array that have 4 or more duplicates comma separated values of previous comma separated entries within the array with 4 spaces as the default code indentation

```purebasic
Procedure RemoveDuplicatesFromArray(myArray.s())
    Define resultArray.s()

    For i = 0 To ArraySize(myArray) - 1
        duplicateCount = 0
        For j = 0 To i - 1
            If myArray(i) = myArray(j)
                duplicateCount + 1
            EndIf
        Next

        If duplicateCount < 4
            AddElement(resultArray, myArray(i))
        EndIf
    Next

    myArray = resultArray
EndProcedure
```
based upon the PDF file https://www.purebasic.com/documentation/PureBasic.pdf, write a procedure to remove unused procedures from a source code file with 4 spaces as the default code indentation

```purebasic
Procedure RemoveUnusedProcedures(sourceFile.s)
    source = ReadFile(sourceFile)
    
    Procedure IsProcedureUsed(procedureName.s)
        If FindString(source, "Procedure " + procedureName + "(") = 0
            source = ReplaceString(source, "Procedure " + procedureName + "(", "// Procedure " + procedureName + "(")
        EndIf
    EndProcedure

    Procedure UpdateSource()
        pos.i = 1
        Repeat
            procedurePos.i = FindString(source, "Procedure ", pos)
            If procedurePos
                procedureName.s = Mid(source, procedurePos + 10, FindString(source, "(", procedurePos + 10) - procedurePos - 10)
                IsProcedureUsed(procedureName)
                pos = procedurePos + 1
            EndIf
        Until Not procedurePos
    EndProcedure

    UpdateSource()
    WriteFile(sourceFile, source)
EndProcedure
```
based upon the PDF file https://www.purebasic.com/documentation/PureBasic.pdf, write a procedure to save a 3 dimensional array of text values with 4 spaces as the default code indentation

```purebasic
Procedure SaveTextArray(data.s[][][])
    FilePath.s = "output.txt"
    FileID.i = OpenFile(FilePath, #PB_File_New)

    If FileID
        For x = 0 To ArraySize(data, 1) - 1
            For y = 0 To ArraySize(data, 2) - 1
                For z = 0 To ArraySize(data, 3) - 1
                    WriteString(FileID, data(x, y, z) + ",")
                Next
                WriteString(FileID, #LF)
            Next
            WriteString(FileID, #LF)
        Next

        CloseFile(FileID)
    EndIf
EndProcedure
```

based upon the PDF file https://www.purebasic.com/documentation/PureBasic.pdf, write a procedure to save a multi-dimensional array of text values that may have 3 or 4 dimensions.  Also include example code to call the procedure.  please use 4 spaces as the default indentation for the code produced.

```purebasic
Procedure SaveTextArray(data.s[,,,,])
    FilePath.s = "output.txt"
    FileID.i = OpenFile(FilePath, #PB_File_New)

    If FileID
        For i1 = 0 To ArraySize(data, 1) - 1
            For i2 = 0 To ArraySize(data, 2) - 1
                For i3 = 0 To ArraySize(data, 3) - 1
                    For i4 = 0 To ArraySize(data, 4) - 1
                        WriteString(FileID, data(i1, i2, i3, i4) + ";")
                    Next
                    WriteString(FileID, #LF)
                Next
                WriteString(FileID, #LF)
            Next
            WriteString(FileID, #LF)
        Next

        CloseFile(FileID)
    EndIf
EndProcedure

; Example code to save a 3-dimensional array
Define TextArray3D.s[10, 10, 10]
SaveTextArray(TextArray3D)
```

In this code snippet, the `SaveTextArray` procedure is defined to save a multi-dimensional array of text values that can have 3 or 4 dimensions. The example code showcases how to call the procedure to save a 3-dimensional array.
